title: ColourFull Biomes/ColorFull Biomes (CFB)
description: 16 new biomes for each of the vanilla Minecraft Colours/Color
body:
ColourFull Biomes/ColorFull Biomes 
This adds 16 new Biomes 1 for each dye colour/color in minecraft this comes with their own wood varients 
and suggestions what to add next are welcome and note that for now NO mobs spawn at all in the biomes
All the biomes (so far):
- The Red Biome
this is a very red biome nice to use for red themed builds so far you can only get red wood and red leaves from this biome
- The Orange Biome
this is a very Orange biome nice to use for Orange themed builds so far you can only get Orange wood and Orange leaves from this biome
- The Yellow Biome
this is a very Yellow biome nice to use for Yellow themed builds so far you can only get Yellow wood and Yellow leaves from this biome
- The Lime Biome
this is a very Lime biome nice to use for Lime themed builds so far you can only get Lime wood and Lime leaves from this biome
- The Green Biome
this is a very Green biome nice to use for Green themed builds so far you can only get Green wood and Green leaves from this biome
- The Cyan Biome
this is a very Cyan  biome nice to use for Cyan themed builds so far you can only get Cyan wood and Cyan leaves from this biome
- The light blue Biome
this is a very light blue biome nice to use for light blue themed builds so far you can only get light blue wood and light blue leaves from this biome
- The Blue Biome
this is a very Lime biome nice to use for Lime themed builds so far you can only get Lime wood and Lime leaves from this biome
- The Magenta Biome
this is a very Magenta biome nice to use for Magenta themed builds so far you can only get Magenta wood and Magenta leaves from this biome
- The Pink Biome
this is a very Pink biome nice to use for Pink themed builds so far you can only get Pink wood and Pink leaves from this biome
- The Purple Biome
this is a very Purple biome nice to use for Purple themed builds so far you can only get Purple wood and Purple leaves from this biome
- The Brown Biome
this is a very Brown biome nice to use for Brown themed builds so far you can only get Brown wood and Brown leaves from this biome
- The white Biome
this is a very Lime biome nice to use for Lime themed builds so far you can only get Lime wood and Lime leaves from this biome
- The Light gray Biome
this is a very Light gray biome nice to use for Light gray themed builds so far you can only get Light gray wood and Light gray leaves from this biome
- The dark gray Biome
this is a very dark gray biome nice to use for dark gray themed builds so far you can only get dark gray wood and dark gray leaves from this biome
- The black Biome
this is a very black biome nice to use for black themed builds so far you can only get black wood and black leaves from this biome
